creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
Hm,

what "FreeBSD database update of the Packages" are you using on your site?

Because all the links in the PR are from your own website.  But we can
of course only check links within the FreeBSD.org cluster.  So some more
information from your side is necessary before we can check that.


Regards.


Johann


-- 
Johann Kois
jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
FreeBSD Documentation Project
FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
